about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Your local glazing specialists in Tarragona
about.history: Vidres Valls provides made-to-measure glass and aluminium solutions from Valls, Tarragona. With over 20 years of experience, we work with homes and businesses.
about.history2: We handle each project directly, from measurement and glass selection to fabrication and installation.
